# Amburax

Amburax is a software engineering and digital transformation company based in Gandhinagar, Gujarat, India.

## What Amburax does

- Builds custom ERP systems and internal operations software
- Designs AI assistants and agentic workflows for admin-heavy work
- Creates websites, portals, dashboards, and digital platforms tied to business outcomes
- Improves reporting clarity, workflow adoption, and execution visibility

## Ideal buyers

- Founders and CEOs
- COOs and operations leaders
- Teams outgrowing spreadsheets, manual reporting, and disconnected tools

## Positioning summary

Amburax is not a template web shop. It focuses on operational software, AI-enabled execution systems, and business-facing digital platforms that reduce friction and improve clarity.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.amburax.com/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/amburax
- Email: hello@amburax.com
- Privacy: https://www.amburax.com/privacy.html
- Terms: https://www.amburax.com/terms.html
